title: McGrath: Can I trust my AI ‘best friend forever’?

content:

title: Swiss bankers wary, but not spooked by Mythos AI threat
description: The Swiss financial sector is assessing the potential threat posed by frontier artificial intelligence (AI) models.
content:

title: Western Digital Leverages AI Boom to Forecast Revenue Above Estimates
description: The storage specialist anticipates robust demand, driven by artificial intelligence infrastructure, despite a post-announcement dip in its share price.
content: Western Digital has issued Q4 revenue guidance that exceeded expectations, projecting approximately $3.65bn, plus or minus $100m, above the $3.46bn anticipated by analysts. This momentum is underpinned by surging demand for high-capacity storage solu... [911 chars]

title: The Twin Economic Superstorms: Why Your Financial Future Is at Risk from Energy Collapse and AI Job Replacement
description: Two Storms Are About to Hit I have been warning for years that an economic hurricane is bearing down on the United States, and now I see two distinct superstorms converging at once. title: Google on track to become world’s most valuable company, adds $420 billion market cap in single day
description: Alphabet topped Wall Street estimates for quarterly revenue on Wednesday, as enterprise spending on artificial intelligence delivered the best quarter of reported growth for its cloud unit yet.

title: US Stock Market: Meta raises $25 billion via bond sale to fund AI expansion
description: Meta Platforms has secured $25 billion in investment-grade bonds to fuel its aggressive expansion in artificial intelligence infrastructure. This significant debt issuance follows a substantial increase in the company's capital expenditure outlook and reflects a broader trend of Big Tech investing heavily in AI.
content: Meta Platforms has raised $25 billion through a multi-tranche investment-grade bond sale, marking one of its largest debt issuances to date as the company accelerates spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure, according to a regulatory filin... [4040 chars]

title: ‘We need to take down the size of the company’: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg signals more layoffs
description: Mark Zuckerberg told employees that layoffs are linked to the company's rising spending on artificial intelligence (AI)- driven investments.

title: Emerging Stocks See Best Month Since 2022 Amid AI Boom, Oil Fear
description: Emerging-market equities posted the best month since 2022, fueled by rallies in Asian technology shares on optimism over artificial intelligence demand, even as oil supply shock persists amid a US-Iran standoff over the Strait of Hormuz.
